## Type

- [ ] New album / artist
- [ ] Site code (HTML / CSS / JS)

---

## For album submissions

- [ ] I have the right to share this material (own it, or written permission attached).
- [ ] `meta.yaml` declares a licence.
- [ ] Track filenames follow `NN - Title.ext`.
- [ ] Cover art included (square, ≥600 px), or I've explained why not.
- [ ] I added (or updated) my entry in `contributors.yaml`.

## For code / pipeline changes

- [ ] `pytest tests/` passes locally.
- [ ] If the front-end changed, I served `public/` locally and confirmed
      the affected view still renders without console errors.
- [ ] If the catalogue schema changed, I updated `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`
      and the `hibiki-data.js` adapter.
